witness_prompts: Where does the text move from {frame_1} to {frame_2}?
What kind of turn happens at '{threshold_1}'?
Which action feels weighty but unexplained?
How does the passage invite you to witness in your own moment?
What does it mean to stay with {movement_1}?
prayer_frames: Jesus, present in the scene, draw near.
Hold us in truth as we follow.
safety_notes_append: Avoid forcing conclusions; let the text lead the witness.
